hero.title: The driving app that guides you
hero.subtitle: HappyServ helps you prepare for your driver's license with smart features, personalized tracking, and an active community.

features.title: Everything you need to succeed
features.subtitle: Powerful tools to accompany you from learning to getting your license.

planning.title: Smart planning
planning.desc: Organize your driving sessions with adaptive scheduling that learns from your availability.

tracking.title: Real-time tracking
tracking.desc: Visualize your progress with detailed statistics and personalized reports.

community.title: Active community
community.desc: Connect with other learners, share tips and find support.

offline.title: Offline mode
offline.desc: Access your courses and content even without an Internet connection.

support.successMessage: Message sent successfully! We will get back to you as soon as possible.

blog.title: Blog

about.title: About HappyServ
about.subtitle: Our mission: making driver education accessible to everyone

story.title: Our story
story.content: HappyServ was born from a simple observation: traditional driving education methods don't meet the needs of today's learners. Founded in 2024, our passionate team developed an app that combines cutting-edge technology with innovative pedagogy to deliver a unique learning experience.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: We use the latest technologies to improve the learning experience.

accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: HappyServ is free and available to everyone, everywhere in the world.

community.title: Community
community.desc: We believe in the power of mutual aid and sharing among learners.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: A question? A suggestion? Feel free to write to us.

mentions.title: Legal notices
mentions.content: HappyServ is a simplified joint-stock company with a capital of €10,000, registered with the Paris Trade and Companies Register under number 123 456 789. Registered office: 123 Rue de l'Innovation, 75001 Paris. VAT number: FR12345678901. Publication director: Jean Dupont.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.content: We take the protection of your personal data very seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use and protect your information when you use HappyServ.

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.content: These terms of service govern the use of the HappyServ application. By using the application, you accept these terms in their entirety.

status.title: Service status
status.subtitle: Check the real-time status of our services
